idea-plugin.name: Yet Another Worktrees Panel
idea-plugin.description:
Manage your Git worktrees from a "Worktrees" tab in the Version Control tool window.
  • List every worktree of the current repositories and branches without one.
  • Open a worktree in a new IDE window; show a branch in the Git Log.
  • Remove / prune a worktree, optionally deleting its branch — with guard rails.
